title: NSPS-924 It Was My Hobby To Get Cuckold Fucked But Now My Wife Really Did Get Fucked Kaori Iiyama
description: A double-income couple. A husband who learned that his wife was sexually harassed by her boss at work. Anger causes his wife to quit his job. However, I gradually come to imagine my wife being embraced by others. And the husband asks his wife's boss who was sexually harassed to persuade his wife.
